jsonLd.title: Ustraa is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ustraa! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ustraa:
Ustraa is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ustraa!
